<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>RH²-Systems | Elite Offensive Security</title>
<!-- ═══════════════════════════
     RH²-Systems ◈ Favicons
     ═══════════════════════════ -->
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/x-icon;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="data:image/svg+xml;base64,">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0b0b0f">
<meta name="description" content="RH²-Systems — Advanced penetration testing, red team operations, and secure engineering for high-risk enterprise infrastructure.">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#000000">
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     RH²-Systems ◈ Favicon Set (embedded)
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<link rel="shortcut icon" href="data:image/x-icon;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="16x16" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" sizes="32x32" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="data:image/svg+xml;base64,">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" sizes="180x180" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#0b0b0f">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Bebas+Neue&family=DM+Serif+Display:ital@0;1&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/three.js/r128/three.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.2/gsap.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/gsap/3.12.2/ScrollTrigger.min.js"></script>
<style>
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RH²-SYSTEMS ◈ WORLD-CLASS DESIGN ENGINE v∞
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
:root{
  --void:#000;--ink:#04040a;--deep:#07070f;--panel:#0a0a14;
  --ember:#ff2d00;--ember2:#ff6500;--ember3:#ffa500;
  --neon:#00ffcc;--ice:#00c8ff;
  --white:#f0ede8;--mist:#a8a49e;--dim:#3a3840;
  --b0:rgba(255,255,255,.04);--b1:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  --be:rgba(255,45,0,.3);
  --ff-d:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif;
  --ff-s:'DM Serif Display',serif;
  --ff-m:'Space Mono',monospace;
  --ease-out:cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1);
  --ease-in-out:cubic-bezier(.87,0,.13,1);
}
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
html{scroll-behavior:auto;overflow-x:hidden}
body{background:var(--void);color:var(--white);font-family:var(--ff-m);line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none}
a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit}ul{list-style:none}button{border:none;background:none;font-family:inherit;color:inherit;cursor:none}
::selection{background:rgba(255,45,0,.25);color:var(--white)}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:2px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--void)}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--ember)}

/* ── CURSOR SYSTEM ── */
#C{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;z-index:99999;pointer-events:none;mix-blend-mode:difference}
.c-dot{position:absolute;width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--white);border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s,opacity .2s}
.c-ring{position:absolute;width:44px;height:44px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.6);border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .5s var(--ease-out),height .5s var(--ease-out),border-radius .4s,border-color .3s}
body.chov .c-dot{width:0;height:0;opacity:0}
body.chov .c-ring{width:72px;height:72px;border-radius:4px;border-color:var(--ember)}

/* ── SHADER CANVAS (FULL BG) ── */
#shader-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.7}

/* ── NOISE ── */
#noise{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:2;pointer-events:none;opacity:.025;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 512 512' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  mix-blend-mode:overlay}

/* ── PRELOADER ── */
#pre{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99997;background:var(--void);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0}
#pre.leave{animation:pre-wipe .9s var(--ease-in-out) forwards}
@keyframes pre-wipe{0%{clip-path:inset(0 0 0 0)}100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 100% 0)}}
.pre-wordmark{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(5rem,15vw,12rem);letter-spacing:.08em;line-height:1;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--ember),var(--ember2),var(--ember3));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:pre-flicker 2s ease infinite alternate}
@keyframes pre-flicker{0%{opacity:.3}30%{opacity:1}60%{opacity:.7}100%{opacity:1}}
.pre-bar{width:180px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);margin-top:48px;position:relative;overflow:visible}
.pre-bar-fill{height:1px;width:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ember),var(--ember3));box-shadow:0 0 16px var(--ember);transition:width .3s ease}
.pre-bar-dot{position:absolute;right:-3px;top:-2.5px;width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--ember);opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s}
.pre-pct{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.3em;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);margin-top:20px;font-family:var(--ff-m)}
.pre-tagline{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.15);margin-top:12px;font-family:var(--ff-m)}

/* ── LAYOUT ── */
.W{width:min(1360px,92%);margin:auto}
main{position:relative;z-index:1}
section{position:relative}

/* ── HEADER ── */
header{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;height:70px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0);backdrop-filter:blur(40px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(40px);background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);transform:translateZ(0)}
nav{height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.logo{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:1.45rem;letter-spacing:.12em;color:var(--white);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0}
.logo em{font-style:normal;color:var(--ember)}
.logo sup{font-family:var(--ff-m);font-size:.5rem;vertical-align:super;color:var(--ember);letter-spacing:.1em;margin-left:2px;opacity:.8}
.nav-l{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:36px}
.nav-l a{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mist);transition:color .25s;position:relative}
.nav-l a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-3px;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:var(--ember);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .4s var(--ease-out)}
.nav-l a:hover{color:var(--white)}
.nav-l a:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.nav-cta{padding:9px 22px;border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.5);color:var(--ember)!important;font-size:.62rem!important;letter-spacing:.18em!important;text-transform:uppercase;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:color .3s!important}
.nav-cta::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--ember);transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .35s var(--ease-out);z-index:-1}
.nav-cta:hover{color:var(--void)!important}
.nav-cta:hover::before{transform:translateX(0)}
.nav-cta::after{display:none!important}
.h-burg{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;padding:6px}
.h-burg span{display:block;width:24px;height:1.5px;background:var(--white);transition:.3s}
.mob-nav{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;top:70px;z-index:999;background:rgba(0,0,0,.98);backdrop-filter:blur(40px);flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:44px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
.mob-nav.on{display:flex;opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.mob-nav a{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:3.5rem;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--white);transition:color .2s}
.mob-nav a:hover{color:var(--ember)}

/* ══════════════════
   HERO
══════════════════ */
.hero{min-height:100dvh;display:grid;grid-template-rows:1fr auto;padding-top:70px;overflow:hidden}
#hero-gl{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none}
.hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:80px 0 40px}
.hero-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:7px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.2);background:rgba(255,45,0,.04);font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.24em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);margin-bottom:2.5rem;opacity:0}
.chip-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--ember);animation:blink 2s ease infinite}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.2}}
.hero-h1{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(5rem,13vw,17rem);line-height:.88;letter-spacing:.02em;overflow:hidden}
.hero-h1 .line{display:block;overflow:hidden}
.hero-h1 .line-in{display:block;transform:translateY(108%);will-change:transform}
.hero-h1 .grad{background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ember) 0%,var(--ember2) 50%,var(--ember3) 100%);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text}
.hero-h1 .ghost{-webkit-text-stroke:1px rgba(255,255,255,.12);-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.hero-split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:end;margin-top:56px}
.hero-desc{color:var(--mist);font-size:.92rem;line-height:2;max-width:420px;opacity:0}
.hero-desc strong{color:var(--white)}
.hero-right{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-end;gap:20px;opacity:0}
.cta-prime{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:18px 42px;background:var(--ember);color:var(--void);font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform .4s var(--ease-out);will-change:transform}
.cta-prime::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--ember3);transform:translateX(-101%);transition:transform .5s var(--ease-out)}
.cta-prime span{position:relative;z-index:1}
.cta-prime:hover{transform:translateY(-4px)}
.cta-prime:hover::before{transform:translateX(0)}
.cta-sec{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mist);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);padding-bottom:4px;transition:color .3s,border-color .3s}
.cta-sec:hover{color:var(--white);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
.hero-stats-row{position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);border-top:1px solid var(--b0);opacity:0}
.hst{padding:24px 28px;border-right:1px solid var(--b0);position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:default}
.hst:last-child{border-right:none}
.hst::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--ember);transition:width .8s var(--ease-out)}
.hst:hover::after{width:100%}
.hst-n{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.5rem);letter-spacing:.04em;line-height:1;color:var(--ember);text-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(255,45,0,.3)}
.hst-l{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-top:6px}

/* SCROLL ARROW */
.scroll-arr{position:absolute;bottom:30px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:3;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;opacity:.4}
.scroll-arr span{font-size:.54rem;letter-spacing:.24em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mist)}
.arr-line{width:1px;height:52px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--ember),transparent);animation:arr-fall 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes arr-fall{
  0%{transform:scaleY(0) translateY(0);transform-origin:top center;opacity:0}
  20%{opacity:1}
  50%{transform:scaleY(1) translateY(0);transform-origin:top center;opacity:1}
  51%{transform:scaleY(1) translateY(0);transform-origin:bottom center}
  100%{transform:scaleY(0) translateY(0);transform-origin:bottom center;opacity:0}
}

/* ══════════════════
   TICKER
══════════════════ */
.ticker-wrap{overflow:hidden;border-top:1px solid var(--b0);border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0);background:rgba(255,45,0,.025);position:relative;z-index:2}
.ticker-wrap::before,.ticker-wrap::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;width:120px;z-index:2;pointer-events:none}
.ticker-wrap::before{left:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--void),transparent)}
.ticker-wrap::after{right:0;background:linear-gradient(270deg,var(--void),transparent)}
.ticker-tr{display:flex;animation:tick 28s linear infinite;white-space:nowrap;transform:translateZ(0);backface-visibility:hidden;will-change:transform}
@keyframes tick{from{transform:translateX(0)}to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.tick-item{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:13px 36px;font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);border-right:1px solid var(--b0);flex-shrink:0}
.tick-item em{font-style:normal;color:var(--ember)}
.tick-dot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--ember)}

/* ══════════════════
   MANIFESTO / ABOUT
══════════════════ */
#manifesto{padding:180px 0;background:var(--void);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.manifesto-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:120px;align-items:start}
.manifesto-vert{writing-mode:vertical-rl;text-orientation:mixed;font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(6rem,14vw,12rem);color:rgba(255,45,0,.04);user-select:none;pointer-events:none;line-height:1;letter-spacing:.04em;align-self:center}
.manifesto-content{}
.manifesto-eyebrow{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.manifesto-eyebrow::before{content:'';width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--ember)}
.manifesto-title{font-family:var(--ff-s);font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,5rem);line-height:1.15;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:3rem;font-style:italic}
.manifesto-title em{font-style:normal;color:var(--ember)}
.manifesto-body{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:40px 60px}
.mf-block{}
.mf-block p{color:var(--mist);font-size:.9rem;line-height:2}
.mf-block p+p{margin-top:1.2rem}
.mf-num{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:4rem;color:rgba(255,45,0,.06);line-height:1;margin-bottom:-.5rem}

/* ══════════════════
   SERVICES
══════════════════ */
#services{padding:140px 0;background:var(--ink);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.svc-hdr{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:end;margin-bottom:100px}
.svc-num-title{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(4rem,10vw,12rem);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:.02em}
.svc-ghost{-webkit-text-stroke:1px rgba(255,255,255,.06);-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.svc-sub{color:var(--mist);font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;max-width:380px;align-self:end}
/* Cards — horizontal scroll immersive */
.svc-track{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1px;background:var(--b0)}
.svc-c{background:var(--void);padding:0;overflow:hidden;position:relative;cursor:default;transition:background .5s}
.svc-c:hover{background:var(--deep)}
.svc-c-inner{padding:64px 48px 56px;position:relative;z-index:1}
.svc-c-glow{position:absolute;top:-80px;right:-80px;width:300px;height:300px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,45,0,.08),transparent 65%);pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .6s}
.svc-c:hover .svc-c-glow{opacity:1}
.svc-c-line{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:2px;height:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--ember),var(--ember3));box-shadow:0 0 16px var(--ember);transition:height .7s var(--ease-out)}
.svc-c:hover .svc-c-line{height:100%}
.svc-c-ico{width:48px;height:48px;border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:2.5rem;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s}
.svc-c:hover .svc-c-ico{border-color:rgba(255,45,0,.5);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,45,0,.12)}
.svc-c-ico svg{width:20px;height:20px;stroke:var(--ember);fill:none;stroke-width:1.6;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
.svc-c-id{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:.26em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,45,0,.5);margin-bottom:.8rem}
.svc-c h3{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:2.4rem;letter-spacing:.04em;line-height:1;margin-bottom:1.2rem}
.svc-c p{color:var(--mist);font-size:.87rem;line-height:1.95}
.svc-c-arr{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);margin-top:2rem;opacity:0;transform:translateX(-10px);transition:opacity .35s,transform .35s var(--ease-out)}
.svc-c-arr svg{width:13px;height:13px;stroke:currentColor;fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;transition:transform .3s}
.svc-c:hover .svc-c-arr{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}
.svc-c-arr:hover svg{transform:translateX(5px)}

/* ══════════════════
   TEAM — CINEMATIC
══════════════════ */
#team{padding:160px 0;background:var(--void);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
#team-bg-canvas{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:.6}
.team-hdr{position:relative;z-index:1;margin-bottom:100px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:end}
.team-title-wrap{}
.team-eyebrow{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:2rem}
.team-eyebrow::before{content:'';width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--ember)}
.team-big-title{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(4rem,10vw,12rem);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:.02em}
.team-big-ghost{-webkit-text-stroke:1px rgba(255,255,255,.07);-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent}
.team-tagline{color:var(--mist);font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;max-width:360px;align-self:end}
.team-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);position:relative;z-index:1}
.tc{display:block;background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);text-decoration:none;color:inherit;overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:background .5s}
.tc:hover{background:rgba(7,7,15,.9)}
.tc-top{padding:60px 52px 48px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.tc-halo{position:absolute;top:-60px;right:-60px;width:220px;height:220px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,45,0,.06),transparent 65%);opacity:0;transition:opacity .6s;pointer-events:none}
.tc:hover .tc-halo{opacity:1}
.tc-av{width:76px;height:76px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.25);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:1.4rem;letter-spacing:.06em;color:var(--ember);margin-bottom:1.5rem;position:relative;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(255,45,0,.08);background:rgba(255,45,0,.03)}
.tc-av::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-6px;border-radius:50%;border:1px dashed rgba(255,45,0,.12);animation:rot 14s linear infinite}
@keyframes rot{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.tc-name{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.8rem);letter-spacing:.04em;line-height:1;margin-bottom:.5rem}
.tc-role{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember)}
.tc-body{padding:40px 52px 52px}
.tc-body p{color:var(--mist);font-size:.87rem;line-height:1.95;margin-bottom:2rem}
.skills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.sk{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 14px;border:1px solid var(--b0);color:var(--mist);transition:border-color .3s,color .3s}
.tc:hover .sk{border-color:rgba(255,45,0,.15);color:var(--white)}
.tc-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);transition:gap .35s var(--ease-out)}
.tc:hover .tc-link{gap:18px}
.tc-link svg{width:13px;height:13px;stroke:currentColor;fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}

/* ══════════════════
   TELEMETRY
══════════════════ */
#intel{padding:160px 0;background:var(--ink);position:relative}
#intel::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:500px;height:100%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 100% 50%,rgba(255,45,0,.04),transparent 65%);pointer-events:none}
.intel-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.15fr;gap:100px;align-items:start;margin-top:5rem}
.intel-l p{color:var(--mist);font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;margin-bottom:2.5rem}
.intel-facts{border-top:1px solid var(--b0)}
.if{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:20px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0)}
.if-ico{width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid var(--b0);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:border-color .3s}
.if:hover .if-ico{border-color:rgba(255,45,0,.3)}
.if-ico svg{width:14px;height:14px;stroke:var(--ember);fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
.if-lbl{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
.if-val{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--white)}
/* Waveform */
.wave-wrap{margin-top:2.5rem;border:1px solid var(--b0);background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);position:relative}
.wave-hdr{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0)}
.wave-hdr-l{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim)}
.wave-hdr-r{font-size:.58rem;color:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.w-blink{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);animation:blink 1s ease infinite}
#wave-cv{display:block;width:100%;height:110px}
/* Terminal */
.tty2{background:var(--void);border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.12);position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,45,0,.04),0 60px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.8)}
.tty2-glow{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:conic-gradient(from var(--a,0deg) at 50% 0%,rgba(255,45,0,.6),transparent 30%,transparent 70%,rgba(255,100,0,.4),rgba(255,45,0,.6));border-radius:inherit;z-index:0;padding:1px;-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);-webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude;animation:spin-glow 4s linear infinite}
@property --a{syntax:'<angle>';initial-value:0deg;inherits:false}
@keyframes spin-glow{to{--a:360deg}}
.tty2>*:not(.tty2-glow){position:relative;z-index:1}
.tty2-bar{position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,45,0,.8),var(--ember2),rgba(255,45,0,.8),transparent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--ember);opacity:0;animation:scan2 4s ease-in-out infinite;pointer-events:none;z-index:10}
@keyframes scan2{0%{top:0;opacity:0}3%{opacity:1}93%{opacity:.8}100%{top:100%;opacity:0}}
.tty2-chrome{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:13px 18px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.tty2-dots{display:flex;gap:5px}
.td{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%}
.td1{background:#ff5f57}.td2{background:#febc2e}.td3{background:#28c840}
.tty2-ttl{font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--dim);flex:1;margin-left:8px}
.tty2-live{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-size:.6rem;color:var(--ember)}
.tl2{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);animation:blink 1.4s ease infinite}
.tty2-hud{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:7px 18px;background:rgba(255,45,0,.03);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03);font-size:.54rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim)}
.tty2-hud span b{color:var(--ember)}
.tty2-cmd{padding:9px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.02);font-size:.66rem;color:rgba(255,45,0,.45)}
.tty2-body{padding:10px 16px 14px}
.tty2-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 12px}
.tty2-cat{grid-column:1/-1;padding:8px 0 4px}
.tty2-cat-l{font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:.26em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);opacity:.7;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.tty2-cat-l::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(255,45,0,.12)}
.tr{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.025)}
.tr:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.tr-k{font-size:.5rem;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}
.tr-k::before{content:'⟩ ';color:var(--ember);opacity:.4;font-size:.85em}
.tr-v{font-size:.67rem;color:#9ea8ba;word-break:break-all;line-height:1.4;transition:color .4s}
.tr-v.ld::after{content:'▋';animation:blink .75s step-end infinite;color:var(--ember);opacity:.7;margin-left:2px}
.tr-v.ldd{animation:vIn .4s var(--ease-out)}
@keyframes vIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateX(6px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.tr-v.hi{color:var(--ember)!important;text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(255,45,0,.5)}
.tr-v.ok{color:#28c840!important}
.tr-v.wn{color:#ffaa00!important}
.tr-v.sid{color:var(--ember2)!important;font-weight:700;font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.08em}
.tty2-threat{padding:10px 18px 6px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.tty2-tl{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.54rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:8px}
.tty2-tl span{color:var(--ember)}
.tbar{height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.tbar-f{height:100%;width:0;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--ember),var(--ember2),var(--ember3));box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--ember);transition:width 3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) .5s}
.tty2-foot{padding:8px 18px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.54rem;color:var(--dim);background:rgba(255,45,0,.02)}

/* ══ CREEP ENHANCEMENTS ══ */
/* Glitch title */
.intel-glitch-title{position:relative;display:inline-block}
@keyframes glitch1{0%,95%,100%{clip-path:inset(0 0 100% 0);transform:translate(0)}96%{clip-path:inset(30% 0 50% 0);transform:translate(-4px,1px)}97%{clip-path:inset(60% 0 10% 0);transform:translate(4px,-2px)}98%{clip-path:inset(10% 0 80% 0);transform:translate(-2px,2px)}}
.intel-glitch-title::before{content:attr(data-text);position:absolute;left:0;top:0;color:var(--ember);opacity:.7;animation:glitch1 6s step-end infinite;pointer-events:none}
/* Creep banner */
.creep-banner{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin:2.5rem auto;max-width:640px;padding:14px 22px;border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.3);background:rgba(255,45,0,.05);font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);animation:crp-pulse 3s ease infinite}
@keyframes crp-pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(255,45,0,.0)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,45,0,.15)}}
.creep-icon{font-size:1rem;animation:blink 1.2s step-end infinite}
/* Threat verdict card */
.threat-verdict{border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.18);background:rgba(255,45,0,.03);margin-bottom:2rem;overflow:hidden}
.tv-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:12px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.1);background:rgba(255,45,0,.06)}
.tv-label{font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:.24em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim)}
.tv-badge{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--void);background:var(--dim);padding:3px 10px;animation:badge-scan 2s ease infinite}
.tv-badge.danger{background:var(--ember);color:var(--void);animation:none;box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(255,45,0,.5)}
.tv-badge.medium{background:#ffaa00;color:#000;animation:none}
@keyframes badge-scan{0%,100%{opacity:.5}50%{opacity:1}}
.tv-findings{padding:8px 18px 12px}
.tv-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:7px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.tv-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.tv-k{font-size:.52rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim)}
.tv-v{font-size:.66rem;color:#9ea8ba;text-align:right}
.tv-v.exposed{color:#ff4444!important;text-shadow:0 0 8px rgba(255,60,60,.4)}
.tv-v.partial{color:#ffaa00!important}
.tv-v.protected{color:#28c840!important}
.tv-footer{padding:8px 18px;font-size:.54rem;letter-spacing:.06em;color:rgba(255,45,0,.5);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.06);background:rgba(255,45,0,.02)}
.tv-footer::before{content:'// '}
/* Profiled reveal */
.profiled-reveal{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.15);background:rgba(255,45,0,.06);padding:16px 18px;opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease;pointer-events:none}
.profiled-reveal.show{opacity:1;transform:none;pointer-events:auto}
.pr-inner{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.pr-icon{font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--ember);animation:blink 1.5s step-end infinite}
.pr-line{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);text-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(255,45,0,.6)}
.pr-sub{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-left:auto}

/* ══════════════════
   GLOBE
══════════════════ */
#globe{padding:140px 0;background:var(--void);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.globe-hdr{margin-bottom:60px}
.globe-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center}
#globe-cv{width:100%;height:520px;display:block}
.globe-r{}
.globe-desc{color:var(--mist);font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;margin:2rem 0 3rem}
.globe-stats{border-top:1px solid var(--b0)}
.gs{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0)}
.gs-l{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mist)}
.gs-r{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:8px}
.gs-v{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:2rem;letter-spacing:.04em;color:var(--ember)}
.gs-t{font-size:.58rem;color:#28c840}

/* ══════════════════
   CONTACT
══════════════════ */
#contact{padding:160px 0;background:var(--ink);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.contact-hdr{margin-bottom:80px}
.contact-layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1.35fr;gap:120px}
.cl-l p{color:var(--mist);font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;margin-bottom:3rem}
.c-dets{border-top:1px solid var(--b0)}
.cd2{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;padding:20px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0)}
.cd2-ico{width:36px;height:36px;border:1px solid var(--b0);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}
.cd2-ico svg{width:14px;height:14px;stroke:var(--ember);fill:none;stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round}
.cd2-lbl{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
.cd2-val{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--white)}
.cl-note{margin-top:2rem;padding:14px 16px;border-left:2px solid var(--ember);background:rgba(255,45,0,.04);font-size:.66rem;color:rgba(255,45,0,.75);letter-spacing:.04em}
.cl-note::before{content:'// ';opacity:.5}
/* Form */
.cf{background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid var(--b0);padding:60px 52px;position:relative}
.cf::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--ember),var(--ember2),transparent)}
.cf::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:60px;height:60px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.15);border-right:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.15)}
.fg2{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:20px}
.fi2{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:22px}
.fi2 label{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim)}
.fi2 input,.fi2 textarea{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);padding:14px 18px;color:var(--white);font-family:var(--ff-m);font-size:.9rem;width:100%;-webkit-appearance:none;caret-color:var(--ember);transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s}
.fi2 input:focus,.fi2 textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:rgba(255,45,0,.3);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(255,45,0,.05)}
.fi2 textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:150px}
.fsub2{width:100%;padding:20px;background:var(--ember);color:var(--void);font-family:var(--ff-m);font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:transform .4s var(--ease-out),box-shadow .4s}
.fsub2::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--ember2);transform:translateX(-101%);transition:transform .5s var(--ease-out)}
.fsub2 span{position:relative;z-index:1}
.fsub2:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(255,45,0,.2)}
.fsub2:hover::before{transform:translateX(0)}
.fsub2:disabled{opacity:.5;transform:none}

/* ══════════════════
   SUCCESS
══════════════════ */
#sov2{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:99996;background:rgba(0,0,0,.96);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .4s}
#sov2.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.sm2{background:var(--deep);border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.2);padding:80px 60px;text-align:center;max-width:420px;width:90%;transform:scale(.88) translateY(24px);transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.175,.885,.32,1.275)}
#sov2.on .sm2{transform:scale(1) translateY(0)}
.sm2-ring{width:80px;height:80px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--ember);margin:0 auto 28px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:2rem;color:var(--ember);box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(255,45,0,.15)}
.sm2 h3{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:2.5rem;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:10px}
.sm2 p{color:var(--mist);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:32px}

/* ══════════════════
   FOOTER
══════════════════ */
footer{background:var(--void);border-top:1px solid var(--b0);padding:80px 0 44px}
.ft-top{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr 1fr;gap:80px;padding-bottom:60px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0);margin-bottom:40px}
.ft-brand p{color:var(--mist);font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.9;margin-top:14px;max-width:300px}
.ft-col h5{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.24em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);margin-bottom:1.5rem}
.ft-col ul{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
.ft-col a{font-size:.86rem;color:var(--mist);transition:color .25s,padding-left .25s}
.ft-col a:hover{color:var(--ember);padding-left:8px}
.ft-bot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:16px}
.ft-copy{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.1em;color:rgba(58,56,64,.7)}
.ft-r{font-size:.58rem;color:var(--dim)}
.ft-r span{color:var(--ember)}

/* ══════════════════
   CHAT
══════════════════ */
#chat-btn{position:fixed;bottom:32px;right:32px;z-index:500;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);color:var(--void);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.3rem;animation:chat-p 2.5s ease infinite;transition:transform .3s;cursor:none;border:none}
@keyframes chat-p{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(255,45,0,.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 14px rgba(255,45,0,0)}}
#chat-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.1)}
#chat-btn.open{animation:none;background:#111}
#chat-box{position:fixed;bottom:100px;right:24px;z-index:9000;width:360px;max-width:calc(100vw - 32px);background:rgba(4,4,10,.98);backdrop-filter:blur(40px);border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.18);box-shadow:0 40px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.8);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transform:translateY(20px) scale(.96);transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
#chat-box.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}
.ch-hdr{padding:16px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;background:rgba(255,45,0,.04)}
.ch-av{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.85rem;flex-shrink:0}
.ch-info h4{font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:.95rem;letter-spacing:.06em}
.ch-info p{font-size:.56rem;color:var(--ember);letter-spacing:.1em}
.ch-close{margin-left:auto;color:var(--mist);font-size:1.1rem;cursor:none;background:none;border:none;transition:color .2s}
.ch-close:hover{color:var(--white)}
.ch-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;min-height:220px;max-height:300px;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:rgba(255,45,0,.2) transparent}
.cmsg{max-width:90%;padding:10px 13px;font-size:.82rem;line-height:1.6;animation:mIn .3s var(--ease-out)}
@keyframes mIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.cmsg.bot{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--b0);align-self:flex-start}
.cmsg.usr{background:rgba(255,45,0,.12);border:1px solid rgba(255,45,0,.18);align-self:flex-end}
.ch-sugg{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;padding:4px 0}
.csb{font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:.06em;padding:5px 10px;border:1px solid var(--b0);color:var(--mist);cursor:none;transition:color .2s,border-color .2s;background:none;font-family:var(--ff-m)}
.csb:hover{color:var(--ember);border-color:rgba(255,45,0,.4)}
.ch-foot{padding:10px 14px;border-top:1px solid var(--b0);display:flex;gap:8px}
.ch-inp{flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--b0);padding:9px 12px;color:var(--white);font-family:var(--ff-m);font-size:.82rem;outline:none;caret-color:var(--ember);transition:border-color .25s}
.ch-inp:focus{border-color:rgba(255,45,0,.3)}
.ch-inp::placeholder{color:var(--dim)}
.ch-send{width:34px;height:34px;background:var(--ember);color:var(--void);border:none;cursor:none;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.88rem;transition:transform .2s}
.ch-send:hover{transform:scale(1.08)}
.ch-send:disabled{opacity:.4}
.ch-typing{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:10px 13px;align-self:flex-start}
.ch-typing span{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ember);opacity:.3;animation:tdot 1.2s ease infinite}
.ch-typing span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s}
.ch-typing span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s}
@keyframes tdot{0%,80%,100%{opacity:.2;transform:scale(.8)}40%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.2)}}

/* ══════════════════
   SCROLL TOP
══════════════════ */
#stt{position:fixed;bottom:32px;right:96px;z-index:500;width:44px;height:44px;border:1px solid var(--b0);background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);color:var(--mist);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s,transform .3s,color .3s,border-color .3s;cursor:none}
#stt.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
#stt:hover{color:var(--ember);border-color:rgba(255,45,0,.4);transform:translateY(-4px)}

/* ══════════════════
   REVEAL ANIMATIONS
══════════════════ */
[data-r]{opacity:0;transform:translateY(48px);transition:opacity 1s var(--ease-out),transform 1s var(--ease-out)}
[data-r].in{opacity:1;transform:none}
[data-r][data-rd="1"]{transition-delay:.1s}[data-r][data-rd="2"]{transition-delay:.2s}[data-r][data-rd="3"]{transition-delay:.3s}[data-r][data-rd="4"]{transition-delay:.4s}[data-r][data-rd="5"]{transition-delay:.5s}

/* CLIP REVEAL */
[data-clip]{clip-path:inset(0 100% 0 0);transition:clip-path 1.2s var(--ease-out)}
[data-clip].in{clip-path:inset(0 0% 0 0)}

/* ══════════════════
   RESPONSIVE
══════════════════ */
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .manifesto-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:50px}.manifesto-vert{display:none}
  .svc-hdr{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}.svc-track{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .team-hdr{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}.team-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .intel-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:60px}
  .globe-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}#globe-cv{height:380px}
  .contact-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:60px}
  .ft-top{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .manifesto-body{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
@media(max-width:900px){
  .nav-l{display:none}.h-burg{display:flex}
  body{cursor:auto}#C{display:none}button,a{cursor:pointer}.csb,.ch-send{cursor:pointer}
  .hero-split{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}.hero-right{align-items:flex-start}
  .hero-stats-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
  .svc-c-inner{padding:44px 32px 40px}
  .tc-top,.tc-body{padding-left:32px;padding-right:32px}
  .fg2{grid-template-columns:1fr}.cf{padding:40px 28px}
  .ft-top{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:40px}
  #chat-box{width:calc(100vw - 24px);right:12px;bottom:70px}
  #chat-btn,#stt{right:16px}#chat-btn{bottom:16px}#stt{bottom:72px}
}
@media(max-width:600px){
  .hero-h1{font-size:clamp(3.8rem,14vw,7rem)!important}
  .hero-stats-row{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hst{border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--b0)}
  section{padding:80px 0}
  .svc-num-title{font-size:clamp(3rem,10vw,7rem)!important}
  .team-big-title{font-size:clamp(3rem,10vw,7rem)!important}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- CUSTOM CURSOR -->
<div id="C" aria-hidden="true"><div class="c-dot"></div><div class="c-ring"></div></div>

<!-- NOISE -->
<div id="noise" aria-hidden="true"></div>

<!-- BACKGROUND SHADER -->
<canvas id="shader-bg" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>

<!-- PRELOADER -->
<div id="pre" role="status" aria-label="Loading RH²-Systems">
  <div class="pre-wordmark">RH²</div>
  <div class="pre-bar"><div class="pre-bar-fill" id="pre-fill"></div><div class="pre-bar-dot" id="pre-dot"></div></div>
  <div class="pre-pct" id="pre-pct">0%</div>
  <div class="pre-tagline">Initializing Offensive Security Platform</div>
</div>

<!-- SUCCESS -->
<div id="sov2" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
  <div class="sm2">
    <div class="sm2-ring">✓</div>
    <h3>TRANSMISSION SECURED</h3>
    <p>Message encrypted and delivered. Our operators will respond within 24 hours.</p>
    <button class="fsub2" id="close-sov"><span>ACKNOWLEDGE</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<button id="stt" aria-label="Back to top">↑</button>
<button id="chat-btn" aria-label="Open AI assistant">🛡</button>

<!-- CHAT -->
<div id="chat-box" role="dialog" aria-label="RH² Security AI">
  <div class="ch-hdr"><div class="ch-av">🛡</div><div class="ch-info"><h4>RH²-AI</h4><p>E2E ENCRYPTED · OFFLINE</p></div><button class="ch-close" id="ch-close" aria-label="Close">✕</button></div>
  <div class="ch-msgs" id="ch-msgs">
    <div class="cmsg bot">Hello, Operator. I'm RH²-AI — your encrypted security intelligence assistant. How can I help?</div>
    <div class="ch-sugg" id="ch-sugg"><button class="csb">Red Teaming?</button><button class="csb">PenTesting?</button><button class="csb">Pricing?</button><button class="csb">Meet the team</button></div>
  </div>
  <div class="ch-foot"><input class="ch-inp" id="ch-inp" placeholder="Ask about security..." maxlength="500" autocomplete="off"><button class="ch-send" id="ch-send">➤</button></div>
</div>

<!-- HEADER -->
<header id="hdr">
  <div class="W"><nav>
    <a href="#" class="logo" aria-label="RH²-Systems">RH<em>²</em>-SYS<sup>TM</sup></a>
    <ul class="nav-l">
      <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
      <li><a href="#team">Team</a></li>
      <li><a href="#intel">Intel</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact" class="nav-cta">Engage</a></li>
    </ul>
    <button class="h-burg" id="h-burg" aria-label="Menu" aria-expanded="false"><span></span><span></span><span></span></button>
  </nav></div>
</header>
<nav class="mob-nav" id="mob-nav"><a href="#services">Services</a><a href="#team">Team</a><a href="#intel">Intel</a><a href="#contact">Contact</a></nav>

<main>

<!-- ══ HERO ══ -->
<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <canvas id="hero-gl" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>
  <div class="W hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-chip" id="hero-chip"><span class="chip-dot"></span>System Operational · <span id="utc">00:00:00 UTC</span></div>
    <h1 class="hero-h1" aria-label="Offensive Security. Engineered.">
      <span class="line"><span class="line-in" id="hl1">OFFENSIVE</span></span>
      <span class="line"><span class="line-in grad" id="hl2">SECURITY.</span></span>
      <span class="line"><span class="line-in ghost" id="hl3"><span id="type-el"></span><span style="color:var(--ember);opacity:.7">_</span></span></span>
    </h1>
    <div class="hero-split">
      <p class="hero-desc" id="hero-desc">
        Advanced <strong>penetration testing</strong>, red team operations, and
        <strong>secure engineering</strong> for high-risk enterprise infrastructure worldwide.
        <br><br>Built by engineers who understand both the attack vector and the defense.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-right" id="hero-right">
        <a href="#contact" class="cta-prime"><span>⬡ Initiate Confidential Audit</span></a>
        <a href="#services" class="cta-sec">Explore capabilities →</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-stats-row W" id="hero-stats">
    <div class="hst"><div class="hst-n" data-count="150" data-sfx="+">0</div><div class="hst-l">Engagements</div></div>
    <div class="hst"><div class="hst-n">100%</div><div class="hst-l">Confidentiality</div></div>
    <div class="hst"><div class="hst-n">24/7</div><div class="hst-l">Support</div></div>
    <div class="hst"><div class="hst-n" data-count="0">0</div><div class="hst-l">Client Breaches</div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-arr" aria-hidden="true"><span>Scroll</span><div class="arr-line"></div></div>
</section>

<!-- TICKER -->
<div class="ticker-wrap" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="ticker-tr" id="ticker">
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Threats Blocked <em>2,847</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Active Engagements <em>14</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>CVEs Researched <em>1,240+</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Client Breaches <em>ZERO</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Red Team Ops Live <em>3</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Uptime <em>99.99%</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Zero-Days Staged <em>3</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Encrypted Channels <em>ACTIVE</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Threats Blocked <em>2,847</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Active Engagements <em>14</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>CVEs Researched <em>1,240+</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Client Breaches <em>ZERO</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Red Team Ops Live <em>3</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Uptime <em>99.99%</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Zero-Days Staged <em>3</em></div>
    <div class="tick-item"><span class="tick-dot"></span>Encrypted Channels <em>ACTIVE</em></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ MANIFESTO ══ -->
<section id="manifesto">
  <div class="W">
    <div class="manifesto-inner">
      <div class="manifesto-vert" aria-hidden="true">RECON</div>
      <div class="manifesto-content">
        <div class="manifesto-eyebrow" data-r>00 — Manifesto</div>
        <h2 class="manifesto-title" data-r data-rd="1">We don't <em>secure</em> systems.<br>We <em>break</em> them first.</h2>
        <div class="manifesto-body" data-r data-rd="2">
          <div class="mf-block">
            <div class="mf-num">01</div>
            <p>Every defense is only as strong as the most sophisticated attack it has survived. RH²-Systems thinks like the adversary — because we <em>are</em> the adversary, controlled and authorized.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="mf-block">
            <div class="mf-num">02</div>
            <p>Nation-state tactics. Zero-day research. Living-off-the-land techniques. We replicate the full kill chain before real attackers discover your vulnerabilities.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="mf-block">
            <div class="mf-num">03</div>
            <p>150+ engagements. Zero client breaches post-engagement. 100% confidentiality. These aren't marketing numbers — they're operational standards.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="mf-block">
            <div class="mf-num">04</div>
            <p>Founded by Raj Hridoy and Riyad Hasan — engineers who built secure systems and then learned how to tear them apart. The duality is the advantage.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ SERVICES ══ -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="W">
    <div class="svc-hdr">
      <div data-r>
        <div style="font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:2rem"><span style="width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--ember);display:inline-block"></span>01 — Capabilities</div>
        <div class="svc-num-title">CORE<br><span class="svc-ghost">SERVICES</span></div>
      </div>
      <p class="svc-sub" data-r data-rd="2">Three interconnected disciplines forming a complete offensive security posture — from initial exploitation through to long-term defensive architecture.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="svc-track" data-r>
      <div class="svc-c">
        <div class="svc-c-glow"></div><div class="svc-c-line"></div>
        <div class="svc-c-inner">
          <div class="svc-c-ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg></div>
          <div class="svc-c-id">SVC_001</div>
          <h3>Penetration Testing</h3>
          <p>Manual and automated assessments of Web, Mobile, API, and Cloud infrastructure aligned with OWASP Top 10 and NIST frameworks.</p>
          <a href="#contact" class="svc-c-arr">Engage<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/></svg></a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-c">
        <div class="svc-c-glow"></div><div class="svc-c-line"></div>
        <div class="svc-c-inner">
          <div class="svc-c-ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg></div>
          <div class="svc-c-id">SVC_002</div>
          <h3>Red Team Operations</h3>
          <p>Adversary simulation replicating nation-state APT tactics to test your detection and response capabilities in real-time.</p>
          <a href="#contact" class="svc-c-arr">Engage<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/></svg></a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="svc-c">
        <div class="svc-c-glow"></div><div class="svc-c-line"></div>
        <div class="svc-c-inner">
          <div class="svc-c-ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg></div>
          <div class="svc-c-id">SVC_003</div>
          <h3>Secure Engineering</h3>
          <p>DevSecOps integration, Zero Trust architecture design, and source code review to embed security into the DNA of your software.</p>
          <a href="#contact" class="svc-c-arr">Engage<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/></svg></a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ TEAM ══ -->
<section id="team">
  <canvas id="team-bg-canvas" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>
  <div class="W">
    <div class="team-hdr">
      <div class="team-title-wrap" data-r>
        <div class="team-eyebrow">02 — Leadership</div>
        <div class="team-big-title">THE<br><span class="team-big-ghost">OPERATORS</span></div>
      </div>
      <p class="team-tagline" data-r data-rd="2">Built by engineers who understand both the attack vector and the defense mechanism. Dual expertise. Zero compromise.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="team-grid">
      <a href="https://rh-systems.github.io/Raj-Hridoy/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="tc" data-r>
        <div class="tc-halo"></div>
        <div class="tc-top">
          <div class="tc-av">RH</div>
          <div class="tc-name">Raj Hridoy</div>
          <div class="tc-role">Cybersecurity Engineer</div>
        </div>
        <div class="tc-body">
          <p>Specializing in secure software architecture and complex vulnerability analysis. Raj bridges high-level development with low-level security protocols.</p>
          <div class="skills"><span class="sk">Secure Architecture</span><span class="sk">Python / Go</span><span class="sk">Cloud Security</span><span class="sk">DevSecOps</span></div>
          <div class="tc-link">View Profile<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/></svg></div>
        </div>
      </a>
      <a href="https://rh-systems.github.io/Riyad-Hasan/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="tc" data-r data-rd="2">
        <div class="tc-halo"></div>
        <div class="tc-top">
          <div class="tc-av">RH</div>
          <div class="tc-name">Riyad Hasan</div>
          <div class="tc-role">Ethical Hacker</div>
        </div>
        <div class="tc-body">
          <p>Focused on advanced threat modeling and penetration testing. Riyad specializes in breaking systems to make them unbreakable through adversarial analysis.</p>
          <div class="skills"><span class="sk">PenTesting</span><span class="sk">Network Forensics</span><span class="sk">Red Teaming</span><span class="sk">Exploit Dev</span></div>
          <div class="tc-link">View Profile<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"/><polyline points="12 5 19 12 12 19"/></svg></div>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ INTEL ══ -->
<section id="intel">
  <div class="W">
    <div data-r style="text-align:center">
      <div style="font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:2rem"><span style="width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--ember);display:inline-block"></span>03 — Telemetry</div>
      <div class="intel-glitch-title" style="font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(3.5rem,8vw,9rem);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:.02em" data-text="NETWORK">NETWORK<br><span style="-webkit-text-stroke:1px rgba(255,255,255,.08);-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent"> INTEL</span></div>
      <p style="color:var(--mist);max-width:520px;margin:1.5rem auto 0;font-size:.9rem;line-height:2">You opened this page. <span style="color:var(--ember)">We already know more about you than you think.</span> This is a live demonstration of passive reconnaissance — no hacking required.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- CREEP BANNER — shown after data loads -->
    <div class="creep-banner" id="creep-banner" aria-live="polite">
      <span class="creep-icon">⚠</span>
      <span id="creep-msg">Scanning your connection…</span>
    </div>

    <div class="intel-layout">
      <div data-r data-rd="1">
        <p style="color:var(--mist);font-size:.9rem;line-height:2;margin-bottom:2rem">Before a single exploit is staged, an attacker already knows your city, your ISP, your device, your browser, and your local time. <span style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.7)">They've been watching for minutes before you notice anything is wrong.</span></p>

        <!-- THREAT VERDICT CARD -->
        <div class="threat-verdict" id="threat-verdict">
          <div class="tv-header">
            <span class="tv-label">PASSIVE RECON VERDICT</span>
            <span class="tv-badge" id="tv-badge">SCANNING…</span>
          </div>
          <div class="tv-findings" id="tv-findings">
            <div class="tv-row"><span class="tv-k">Attack Surface</span><span class="tv-v" id="tv-surface">—</span></div>
            <div class="tv-row"><span class="tv-k">Identity Exposure</span><span class="tv-v" id="tv-identity">—</span></div>
            <div class="tv-row"><span class="tv-k">Network Traceability</span><span class="tv-v" id="tv-trace">—</span></div>
            <div class="tv-row"><span class="tv-k">Device Fingerprint</span><span class="tv-v" id="tv-finger">—</span></div>
            <div class="tv-row"><span class="tv-k">Geo Precision</span><span class="tv-v" id="tv-geo">—</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="tv-footer">// This is what attackers collect before they attack you.</div>
        </div>

        <div class="wave-wrap" style="margin-top:2rem">
          <div class="wave-hdr"><span class="wave-hdr-l">Live Threat Activity</span><span class="wave-hdr-r"><span class="w-blink"></span>Real-time Feed</span></div>
          <canvas id="wave-cv" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- TELEMETRY TERMINAL -->
      <div class="tty2" data-r data-rd="2">
        <div class="tty2-glow"></div>
        <div class="tty2-bar"></div>
        <div class="tty2-chrome">
          <div class="tty2-dots"><div class="td td1"></div><div class="td td2"></div><div class="td td3"></div></div>
          <span class="tty2-ttl">rh2sys_recon v5.0 — full telemetry</span>
          <div class="tty2-live"><span class="tl2"></span>LIVE</div>
        </div>
        <div class="tty2-hud">
          <span>ENC: <b>AES-256</b></span><span>PROTO: <b>TLS 1.3</b></span><span>MODE: <b>PASSIVE</b></span><span>SIG: <b id="sc-stat">INIT...</b></span>
        </div>
        <div class="tty2-cmd">$ ./recon --full --passive --stealth --target=visitor</div>
        <div class="tty2-body">
          <div class="tty2-grid">
            <div class="tty2-cat"><div class="tty2-cat-l">Network Identity</div></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">IP Address</span><span class="tr-v ld" id="i-ip"> </span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Country</span><span class="tr-v ld" id="i-country"> </span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">City / Region</span><span class="tr-v ld" id="i-city"> </span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">ISP / ASN</span><span class="tr-v ld" id="i-isp"> </span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Timezone</span><span class="tr-v ld" id="i-tz"> </span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Connection</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-conn">—</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">RTT Latency</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-rtt">—</span></div>
            <div class="tty2-cat"><div class="tty2-cat-l">Device Information</div></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Browser</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-br">Detecting...</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">OS</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-os">Detecting...</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Device Type</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-dev">Detecting...</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">CPU Cores</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-cpu">—</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Device RAM</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-ram">—</span></div>
            <div class="tty2-cat"><div class="tty2-cat-l">Display</div></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Resolution</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-scr">—</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Viewport</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-vp">—</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">DPR</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-dpr">—</span></div>
            <div class="tty2-cat"><div class="tty2-cat-l">GPU</div></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Vendor</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-gpuv">Probing...</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Renderer</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-gpur">Probing...</span></div>
            <div class="tty2-cat"><div class="tty2-cat-l">Session</div></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Session ID</span><span class="tr-v sid" id="i-sid">Generating...</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Local Time</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-time">—</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Page Load</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-load">—</span></div>
            <div class="tty2-cat"><div class="tty2-cat-l">Fingerprint Analysis</div></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Canvas Hash</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-canvas">Computing…</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Font Probe</span><span class="tr-v" id="i-fonts">Probing…</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Entropy Score</span><span class="tr-v hi" id="i-entropy">—</span></div>
            <div class="tr"><span class="tr-k">Uniqueness Est.</span><span class="tr-v wn" id="i-unique">—</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tty2-threat">
          <div class="tty2-tl">Exposure Risk Level <span id="t-pct">0%</span></div>
          <div class="tbar"><div class="tbar-f" id="t-fill"></div></div>
        </div>
        <!-- PROFILED REVEAL -->
        <div class="profiled-reveal" id="profiled-reveal">
          <div class="pr-inner">
            <div class="pr-icon">◈</div>
            <div class="pr-line" id="pr-line">SUBJECT PROFILED</div>
            <div class="pr-sub">Passive collection complete. No interaction required.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tty2-foot"><span>RH²-SYS RECON ENGINE v5.0 · PASSIVE · ENCRYPTED</span><span id="tty-ts">—</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ GLOBE ══ -->
<section id="globe">
  <div class="W">
    <div class="globe-hdr" data-r>
      <div style="font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:2rem"><span style="width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--ember);display:inline-block"></span>04 — Global Intelligence</div>
      <div style="font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(3.5rem,8vw,9rem);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:.02em">LIVE THREAT<br><span style="-webkit-text-stroke:1px rgba(255,255,255,.08);-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent"> LANDSCAPE</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="globe-layout">
      <canvas id="globe-cv" aria-label="Global threat map"></canvas>
      <div class="globe-r" data-r data-rd="2">
        <p class="globe-desc">Real-time visualization of global cyber threat activity. RH²-Systems monitors attack vectors across 140+ countries to keep clients ahead of emerging threats.</p>
        <div class="globe-stats">
          <div class="gs"><span class="gs-l">Active Threats</span><div class="gs-r"><span class="gs-v" data-count="14829">0</span><span class="gs-t">↑ 3.2%</span></div></div>
          <div class="gs"><span class="gs-l">Countries Tracked</span><div class="gs-r"><span class="gs-v" data-count="142">0</span><span class="gs-t">Global</span></div></div>
          <div class="gs"><span class="gs-l">Attack Vectors / Day</span><div class="gs-r"><span class="gs-v" data-count="4200">0</span><span class="gs-t">↑ 1.8%</span></div></div>
          <div class="gs"><span class="gs-l">CVEs Tracked</span><div class="gs-r"><span class="gs-v" data-count="1240">0</span><span class="gs-t">Daily</span></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ CONTACT ══ -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="W">
    <div class="contact-hdr" data-r>
      <div style="font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ember);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:2rem"><span style="width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--ember);display:inline-block"></span>05 — Contact</div>
      <div style="font-family:var(--ff-d);font-size:clamp(3.5rem,8vw,9rem);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:.02em">SECURE<br><span style="-webkit-text-stroke:1px rgba(255,255,255,.08);-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent"> CONSULTATION</span></div>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-layout">
      <div class="cl-l" data-r data-rd="1">
        <p>Ready to fortify your infrastructure? Reach out for a confidential discussion about your security posture and threat exposure.</p>
        <div class="c-dets">
          <div class="cd2"><div class="cd2-ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21 10c0 7-9 13-9 13s-9-6-9-13a9 9 0 0 1 18 0z"/><circle cx="12" cy="10" r="3"/></svg></div><div><span class="cd2-lbl">Location</span><div class="cd2-val">Rajshahi Division, Bangladesh</div></div></div>
          <div class="cd2"><div class="cd2-ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></svg></div><div><span class="cd2-lbl">Availability</span><div class="cd2-val">24 / 7 Incident Support</div></div></div>
          <div class="cd2"><div class="cd2-ico"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="3" y="11" width="18" height="11" rx="2"/><path d="M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4"/></svg></div><div><span class="cd2-lbl">Channels</span><div class="cd2-val">Encrypted comms on request</div></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="cl-note">All submissions encrypted end-to-end via Firebase.</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cf" data-r data-rd="2">
        <form id="cform" novalidate>
          <div class="fg2">
            <div class="fi2"><label for="fn">Full Name / Organization</label><input type="text" id="fn" name="name" placeholder="Acme Corp / Jane Doe" required autocomplete="name"></div>
            <div class="fi2"><label for="fe">Work Email</label><input type="email" id="fe" name="email" placeholder="security@company.com" required autocomplete="email"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="fi2"><label for="fm">Project Scope / Details</label><textarea id="fm" name="message" rows="5" placeholder="Describe your infrastructure and security goals..." required></textarea></div>
          <button type="submit" class="fsub2" id="sub-btn"><span>TRANSMIT ENCRYPTED REQUEST</span></button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ FOOTER ══ -->
<footer>
  <div class="W">
    <div class="ft-top">
      <div class="ft-brand">
        <div class="logo">RH<em style="color:var(--ember)">²</em>-SYS</div>
        <p>Enterprise-grade cybersecurity and offensive security operations for high-risk infrastructure worldwide. 100% confidentiality guaranteed.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="ft-col"><h5>Services</h5><ul><li><a href="#services">Penetration Testing</a></li><li><a href="#services">Red Team Operations</a></li><li><a href="#services">Secure Engineering</a></li></ul></div>
      <div class="ft-col"><h5>Company</h5><ul><li><a href="#team">Our Team</a></li><li><a href="#intel">Intel Scan</a></li><li><a href="#globe">Threat Globe</a></li><li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li></ul></div>
    </div>
    <div class="ft-bot">
      <div class="ft-copy">© 2026 RH²-SYSTEMS · ALL RIGHTS RESERVED · CONFIDENTIALITY GUARANTEED</div>
      <div class="ft-r">Rajshahi, Bangladesh · <span>Offensive Security</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

</main>

<script>
/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RH²-SYSTEMS — WORLD-CLASS JS ENGINE
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── GLSL BACKGROUND SHADER ── */
(function(){
  const cv = document.getElementById('shader-bg');
  if(!cv) return;
  const gl = cv.getContext('webgl') || cv.getContext('experimental-webgl');
  if(!gl) return;

  const VS = `attribute vec2 p; void main(){gl_Position=vec4(p,0,1);}`;
  const FS = `
  precision mediump float;
  uniform float u_t; uniform vec2 u_r; uniform vec2 u_m; uniform float u_aspect;
  #define PI 3.14159265
  float hash(vec2 p){return fract(sin(dot(p,vec2(127.1,311.7)))*43758.5453);}
  float noise(vec2 p){vec2 i=floor(p),f=fract(p);f=f*f*(3.-2.*f);return mix(mix(hash(i),hash(i+vec2(1,0)),f.x),mix(hash(i+vec2(0,1)),hash(i+vec2(1,1)),f.x),f.y);}
  void main(){
    vec2 uv=gl_FragCoord.xy/u_r;
    vec2 p=uv*2.-1.; p.x*=u_aspect;
    float t=u_t*.18;
    // Flowing plasma
    float n=noise(p*2.+t)*0.5+noise(p*4.-t*.7)*0.25+noise(p*8.+t*.3)*0.125;
    // Radial vortex
    float angle=atan(p.y-u_m.y*2.+1.,p.x-u_m.x*2.+1.);
    float radius=length(p);
    float spiral=sin(angle*3.+radius*6.-t*2.)*0.5+0.5;
    // Combine
    float v=n*.6+spiral*.4;
    // Color: ember on void
    vec3 ember1=vec3(1.,.18,.0);
    vec3 void_=vec3(0.,0.,.04);
    vec3 col=mix(void_,ember1,v*.18)*mix(1.,spiral*.4+.7,smoothstep(.3,.7,radius));
    // Vignette
    float vig=1.-dot(uv-.5,uv-.5)*2.8;
    col*=max(0.,vig);
    gl_FragColor=vec4(col,1.);
  }`;

  function mkShader(type, src){
    const s = gl.createShader(type);
    gl.shaderSource(s, src); gl.compileShader(s); return s;
  }
  const prog = gl.createProgram();
  gl.attachShader(prog, mkShader(gl.VERTEX_SHADER, VS));
  gl.attachShader(prog, mkShader(gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER, FS));
  // CORRECT ORDER: link → check → use → get locations
  gl.linkProgram(prog);
  if(!gl.getProgramParameter(prog,gl.LINK_STATUS)){console.warn('RH² shader link failed:',gl.getProgramInfoLog(prog));return;}
  gl.useProgram(prog);

  const buf = gl.createBuffer();
  gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, buf);
  gl.bufferData(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER, new Float32Array([-1,-1,1,-1,-1,1,1,1]), gl.STATIC_DRAW);
  const aLoc = gl.getAttribLocation(prog,'p');
  gl.enableVertexAttribArray(aLoc);
  gl.vertexAttribPointer(aLoc,2,gl.FLOAT,false,0,0);

  const uT=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'u_t');
  const uR=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'u_r');
  const uM=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'u_m');
  const uA=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'u_aspect');

  let W=0,H=0,mx=.5,my=.5,t=0,vis=true,rafId=null;

  function resize(){
    W=Math.floor(window.innerWidth*.4);H=Math.floor(window.innerHeight*.4);
    cv.width=W;cv.height=H;cv.style.width='100vw';cv.style.height='100vh';
    cv.style.imageRendering='pixelated';
    gl.viewport(0,0,W,H);
    if(uA!==null)gl.uniform1f(uA,window.innerWidth/window.innerHeight);
  }
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX/window.innerWidth;my=1-e.clientY/window.innerHeight;},{passive:true});
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange',()=>{
    vis=!document.hidden;
    if(vis&&!rafId){draw();}
  });
  function draw(){
    if(!vis){rafId=null;return;}
    rafId=requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    t+=.016;
    gl.uniform1f(uT,t);gl.uniform2f(uR,W,H);gl.uniform2f(uM,mx,my);
    if(uA!==null)gl.uniform1f(uA,window.innerWidth/window.innerHeight);
    gl.drawArrays(gl.TRIANGLE_STRIP,0,4);
  }
  window.addEventListener('resize',resize,{passive:true});
  resize(); draw();
})();

/* ── PRELOADER ── */
(function(){
  const fill=document.getElementById('pre-fill');
  const dot=document.getElementById('pre-dot');
  const pct=document.getElementById('pre-pct');
  const pre=document.getElementById('pre');
  let p=0,dismissed=false;
  const iv=setInterval(()=>{
    p+=Math.random()*5+1.5;
    if(p>=100){p=100;clearInterval(iv);}
    const f=Math.floor(p);
    fill.style.width=f+'%';
    pct.textContent=f+'%';
    if(f>10)dot.style.opacity='1';
  },40);
  function dismiss(){
    if(dismissed)return; dismissed=true;
    clearInterval(iv);
    pre.classList.add('leave');
    setTimeout(()=>{pre.style.display='none';document.dispatchEvent(new Event('rh2-ready'));},950);
  }
  window.addEventListener('load',()=>setTimeout(dismiss,2800));
  setTimeout(dismiss,3500);
})();

/* ── CURSOR ── */
(function(){
  if(window.matchMedia('(max-width:900px)').matches)return;
  const dot=document.querySelector('.c-dot');
  const ring=document.querySelector('.c-ring');
  dot.style.cssText+='position:fixed;left:0;top:0;pointer-events:none;will-change:transform;';
  ring.style.cssText+='position:fixed;left:0;top:0;pointer-events:none;will-change:transform;';
  let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0,_cursorVis=true,_rafCursor=null;
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange',()=>{
    _cursorVis=!document.hidden;
    if(_cursorVis&&!_rafCursor)cursorLoop();
  });
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;},{passive:true});
  function cursorLoop(){if(!_cursorVis){_rafCursor=null;return;}_rafCursor=requestAnimationFrame(cursorLoop);rx+=(mx-rx)*.12;ry+=(my-ry)*.12;dot.style.transform=`translate(${mx}px,${my}px)`;ring.style.transform=`translate(${rx}px,${ry}px)`;}
  cursorLoop();
  document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.svc-c,.tc,.cta-prime,.cta-sec,.fsub2,.nav-cta').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>document.body.classList.add('chov'));
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>document.body.classList.remove('chov'));
  });
})();

/* ── HEADER ── */
const _hdr=document.getElementById('hdr');
const _stt=document.getElementById('stt');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  if(!_hdr)return;
  _hdr.style.borderBottomColor=window.scrollY>10?'rgba(255,255,255,.06)':'rgba(255,255,255,.02)';
  if(_stt)_stt.classList.toggle('on',window.scrollY>500);
},{passive:true});
document.getElementById('stt').addEventListener('click',()=>window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'}));

/* ── MOBILE NAV ── */
const hburg=document.getElementById('h-burg');
const mnav=document.getElementById('mob-nav');
function closeMobileNav(){mnav.classList.remove('on');hburg.setAttribute('aria-expanded','false');document.body.style.overflow='';}
hburg.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  const on=mnav.classList.toggle('on');
  hburg.setAttribute('aria-expanded',on);
  document.body.style.overflow=on?'hidden':'';
});
document.querySelectorAll('.mob-nav a').forEach(a=>a.addEventListener('click',closeMobileNav));
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape'&&mnav.classList.contains('on'))closeMobileNav();});
window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{if(window.innerWidth>900)closeMobileNav();},{passive:true});

/* ── HERO ENTRANCE ── */
document.addEventListener('rh2-ready',()=>{
  if(window.gsap && window.ScrollTrigger) gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger);
  // Bug 12 fix: set initial state explicitly so GSAP to() has a from value
  gsap.set('#hero-chip',{opacity:0,y:20});
  gsap.set(['#hl1','#hl2','#hl3'],{y:'108%'});
  gsap.set('#hero-desc',{opacity:0,y:30});
  gsap.set('#hero-right',{opacity:0,y:30});
  gsap.set('#hero-stats',{opacity:0});
  gsap.to('#hero-chip',{opacity:1,y:0,duration:.8,ease:'power3.out',delay:.1});
  gsap.to('#hl1',{y:0,duration:1.1,ease:'power4.out',delay:.25});
  gsap.to('#hl2',{y:0,duration:1.1,ease:'power4.out',delay:.38});
  gsap.to('#hl3',{y:0,duration:1.1,ease:'power4.out',delay:.51});
  gsap.to('#hero-desc',{opacity:1,y:0,duration:.9,ease:'power3.out',delay:.75});
  gsap.to('#hero-right',{opacity:1,y:0,duration:.9,ease:'power3.out',delay:.9});
  gsap.to('#hero-stats',{opacity:1,duration:.9,ease:'power2.out',delay:1.1});
  setTimeout(()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('.hst-n[data-count]').forEach(el=>{
      const target=parseInt(el.dataset.count)||0;
      const sfx=el.dataset.sfx||'';
      if(target===0){return;}
      let cur=0;const step=target/60;
      const iv=setInterval(()=>{cur+=step;if(cur>=target){cur=target;clearInterval(iv);}el.textContent=Math.floor(cur)+sfx;},16);
    });
  },1200);
  // GSAP ScrollTrigger parallax
  setTimeout(()=>{
    gsap.to('.manifesto-vert',{yPercent:-30,ease:'none',scrollTrigger:{trigger:'#manifesto',start:'top bottom',end:'bottom top',scrub:2}});
    gsap.from('.svc-c',{y:70,opacity:0,stagger:.15,duration:1,ease:'power3.out',scrollTrigger:{trigger:'.svc-track',start:'top 80%',once:true}});
    ScrollTrigger.refresh();
  },300);
});

/* ── UTC CLOCK ── */
(function(){
  function upd(){const t=new Date();const z=v=>String(v).padStart(2,'0');document.getElementById('utc').textContent=z(t.getUTCHours())+':'+z(t.getUTCMinutes())+':'+z(t.getUTCSeconds())+' UTC';}
  upd();setInterval(upd,1000);
})();

/* ── TYPEWRITER ── */
(function(){
  const words=['ENGINEERED.','UNBREAKABLE.','ADVERSARIAL.','RELENTLESS.'];
  const el=document.getElementById('type-el');
  let wi=0,ci=0,del=false;
  (function tick(){const w=words[wi];el.textContent=del?w.substring(0,--ci):w.substring(0,++ci);let d=del?22:65;if(!del&&ci===w.length){d=2200;del=true;}if(del&&ci===0){del=false;wi=(wi+1)%words.length;}setTimeout(tick,d);})();
})();

/* ── HERO CANVAS (PARTICLE FIELD + RADAR) ── */
(function(){
  const cv=document.getElementById('hero-gl');
  if(!cv)return;
  const ctx=cv.getContext('2d');
  let W=0,H=0,pts=[],t=0,mx=.5,my=.5,vis=false,_rafHero=null;
  function mkP(){return{x:Math.random()*W,y:Math.random()*H,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*.25,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*.25,size:Math.random()*1.2+.3,col:Math.random()>.7?'rgba(255,45,0,':'rgba(255,101,0,',op:Math.random()*.4+.05};}
  function resize(){W=cv.offsetWidth||window.innerWidth;H=cv.offsetHeight||window.innerHeight;cv.width=W;cv.height=H;pts=Array.from({length:Math.min(180,Math.floor(W*H/7000))},mkP);}
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{if(W&&H){mx=e.clientX/W;my=e.clientY/H;}},{passive:true});
  new IntersectionObserver(e=>{
    const nowVis=e[0].isIntersecting;
    if(nowVis&&!vis&&!_rafHero){vis=true;draw();}else{vis=nowVis;}
  },{threshold:.01}).observe(cv);

  // Radar sweep
  let radarAngle=0;
  function draw(){
    if(!vis){_rafHero=null;return;}
    _rafHero=requestAnimationFrame(draw);
    t+=.01; radarAngle+=.008;
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);

    // Subtle grid
    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,45,0,.025)';ctx.lineWidth=.5;
    const gs=60;
    for(let x=0;x<W;x+=gs){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,0);ctx.lineTo(x,H);ctx.stroke();}
    for(let y=0;y<H;y+=gs){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(W,y);ctx.stroke();}

    // Radar circle (bottom-right corner effect)
    const rx=W*.85,ry=H*.5,rr=Math.min(W,H)*.35;
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(rx,ry,rr,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,45,0,.06)';ctx.lineWidth=1;ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(rx,ry,rr*.66,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,45,0,.04)';ctx.stroke();
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(rx,ry,rr*.33,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,45,0,.05)';ctx.stroke();
    // Sweep — fix: build gradient along sweep direction each frame
    ctx.save();ctx.translate(rx,ry);
    const sweepEnd=[Math.cos(radarAngle)*rr,Math.sin(radarAngle)*rr];
    const sweep=ctx.createLinearGradient(sweepEnd[0]*-.6,sweepEnd[1]*-.6,sweepEnd[0],sweepEnd[1]);
    sweep.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,45,0,0)');sweep.addColorStop(.55,'rgba(255,45,0,.06)');sweep.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,45,0,.28)');
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,0);ctx.arc(0,0,rr,radarAngle-1.2,radarAngle);ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fillStyle=sweep;ctx.fill();
    ctx.restore();

    // Particles
    pts.forEach(p=>{
      p.x+=p.vx+(mx-.5)*.15;p.y+=p.vy+(my-.5)*.15;
      if(p.x<0)p.x=W;if(p.x>W)p.x=0;if(p.y<0)p.y=H;if(p.y>H)p.y=0;
      ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.size,0,Math.PI*2);
